title: NIT Surathkal Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for Project Assistant Posts
description: National Institute of Technology Surathkal (NIT Surathkal) has issued an official notification for the recruitment of various Project Assistant Jobs. Candidates who have completed their B.E/ B.Tech, M.E/ M.Tech in Civil Engineering, and M.Sc can use this chance and apply for the NIT Surathkal Notification 2026 . Here we have included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can ...
